Perhaps the most interesting result of our work is the demonstration of the fact that, in the whole of this wide area, the belief that every living member of the tribe is the reincarnation of a spirit ancestor is universal. This belief is just as firmly held by the Ura- bunna people, who count descent in the female line, as it is by the Arunta and Warramunga, who count descent in the male line. These are entirely curative in their effect. So soon as a native feels unwell he will call in the aid of a medicine man, of whom there may be a very consider- able number. The pain or discomfort experienced is due to evil magic, which in some concrete form has entered the patient’s body, and must be removed, very often in such a form that the patient can see it for himself.
